title: Aster DM Healthcare Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Aster DM Healthcare Capital India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Aster DM Healthcare Capital India are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Bhubaneswar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Aster DM Healthcare Capital India:
Aster DM Healthcare Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare Capital India!
